name: Ovulation Cycle & Fertility Window Calculator
description: Industrial-grade tool to estimate ovulation date, fertile window, and cycle variability based on menstrual cycle data. Applies statistical process control (SPC) and lean principles to cycle tracking.

inputs.label: Average cycle length (days)
inputs.businessContext: Typical range for healthy adult women; used as baseline for ovulation estimation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Typical range for healthy adult women; used as baseline for ovulation estimation.

inputs.label: Luteal phase length (days)
inputs.businessContext: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

businessContext_i18n.en: Fixed post-ovulation phase; variation indicates potential luteal phase defect.

inputs.label: Start date of last menstrual period
inputs.businessContext: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

label_i18n.en: Start date of last menstrual period

businessContext_i18n.en: Reference point for calculating next ovulation and fertile window.

inputs.label: Cycle length variability (standard deviation, days)
inputs.businessContext: Used to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window width per SPC rules.

businessContext_i18n.en: Used to compute confidence intervals and adjust fertile window width per SPC rules.

inputs.label: Age group
inputs.businessContext: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; used for risk adjustment.

businessContext_i18n.en: Age affects cycle regularity and fertility; used for risk adjustment.

inputs.label: Irregular cycles (variation > 7 days)
inputs.businessContext: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

businessContext_i18n.en: Triggers alternative calculation method and alerts for medical consultation.

rules.message: Cycle length must be between 20 and 45 days.
Luteal phase length must be between 10 and 16 days.
High variability detected; consider setting 'Irregular cycles' to true.
Short luteal phase in age >40 may indicate diminished ovarian reserve.

thresholds.message: Fertile window extends beyond cycle boundaries; check inputs.
High cycle variability reduces ovulation prediction confidence; consider additional tracking methods.
Luteal phase < 11 days may indicate luteal phase defect; consult healthcare provider.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
